WF053.campaignData:
DIGITAL METRICS:
• Domain Views: 267 over 16-day period
• Total Enquiries: 2 qualified prospects (1 email, 1 phone)
• Open Home Attendance: 5 total viewers across 2 sessions
• Social Media Reach: 2,244 people reached, 6,990 impressions
• Shortlisted: 6 active watchers

PERFORMANCE SUMMARY:
Campaign has been running for 78 days with extended market exposure. Digital engagement shows consistent viewing but conversion to enquiries remains low at 0.75%. This indicates strong online presence but need for strategic positioning review.

WF053.marketAnalysis:
CAMPAIGN ANALYSIS:
It seems like we're facing some market resistance after 78 days on market. What I'm hearing from the data is that we have strong digital reach (6,990 impressions) but limited conversion to serious enquiries.

The way I see it, we have good online visibility but may need to address positioning strategy. No price feedback has been received, which actually tells us something important about our current approach.

KEY INSIGHTS:
• Extended time on market requires strategic review
• Strong digital performance but low enquiry conversion
• Limited buyer feedback suggests price/presentation review needed
• Quality over quantity - focus on serious buyer Glen W.
WF053.nextSteps:
1. Immediate follow-up with Glen W. regarding weekend inspection
2. Strategic pricing review - consider market repositioning
3. Enhanced marketing approach to drive quality enquiries
4. Vendor meeting to discuss campaign refinements
5. Consider alternative marketing strategies given extended timeline
WF053.executiveSummary:
CAMPAIGN TRACKING:
It seems like we need to have an honest conversation about our current position. After 78 days on market with limited enquiry activity, this gives us valuable data about market sentiment.

KEY CONCERNS:
The way I see it, we have strong digital reach but are missing the mark on conversion. No price feedback received indicates potential positioning issues that need addressing.

IMMEDIATE OPPORTUNITIES:
• Glen W. showing genuine interest - priority follow-up required
• Strong social media performance (2,244 people reached) shows market awareness
• Digital engagement healthy but need strategic pivot

NEXT ACTIONS:
• Confirm weekend inspection with Glen W.
• Vendor consultation on pricing strategy
• Review marketing approach effectiveness

OFFERS STATUS: No formal offers received - typical concern after extended campaign period
OPEN HOME: Weekend time to be confirmed for Glen W. inspection
